beats.narration_text: Aloha. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of complex systems: one local rule, no central plan. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of complex systems: one local rule, no central plan
output: ✓ Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan

beats.narration_text: Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. One rule — flip job if fewer than θ of your neighbors share it. Watch 900 agents self-organize. Then hit Disrupt and see the colony recover.. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
beats.new_visual_element: Concept card: Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan

beats.narration_text: Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: θ threshold:, Speed (steps/s):. Verify: One rule — flip job if fewer than θ of your neighbors share it. Watch 900 agents self-organize. Then hit Disrupt and see. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript. Sliders for: θ threshold:, Speed (s

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.
beats.code_snippet: // Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan — core physics
beats.new_visual_element: Onda code-block: core JS (integrator + slider handler)
beats.prompt: Show the core physics loop from yt-complex-systems-threshold.html

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: complex systems: one local rule, no central plan. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag θ threshold: from 0.1 to 0.9. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of θ threshold: from 0.1 to 0.9

beats.narration_text: One rule — flip job if fewer than θ of your neighbors share it. Watch 900 agents self-organize. Then hit Disrupt and see the colony recover.. Exactly as the equations predict.

One prompt. A live demonstration of complex systems: one local rule, no central plan. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this Complex Systems: One Local Rule, No Central Plan simulation and add a second slider that controls θ threshold:. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.
